config.smart_extractor: smart_v2: handle \$, last **bold** number, Answer:N, end-of-line =N, fallback last-int

finding.label: Format failure dominates
finding.summary: Of the 26 problems where A3 is correct and C2 is scored wrong, 24 (92.3%) have the correct gold integer present in C2's completion text. Manual inspection confirms C2 reasoned correctly to the gold answer in markdown prose like '**$16.00**'; the original last-integer fallback regex picks the wrong substring. A prose-aware extractor (smart_v2) lifts C2 from 0.716 to 0.780 with no model change. 90.8% of C2 completions contain the gold integer somewhere, suggesting the true reasoning ceiling is closer to 91%.
